Package io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck

Class CsvCheck

java.lang.Object
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractCheck<CsvCheck,String>
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.CsvCheck
All Implemented Interfaces:
Check<CsvCheck,String>
public final class CsvCheck extends AbstractCheck<CsvCheck,String>
Fluent assertions for CSV data. Supports both inline CSV strings and CSV files.

The parser is RFC 4180-compliant: quoted fields may contain commas, newlines, and escaped double-quotes ("" inside a quoted field represents a literal ").

    • isNotEmpty

    • hasRowCount

      public CsvCheck hasRowCount(int expected)
      Asserts the total number of rows (including the header row, if any).

      For data-only row counting (excluding the header), use hasDataRowCount(int).

    • hasDataRowCount

      public CsvCheck hasDataRowCount(int expected)
      Asserts the number of data rows, excluding the first (header) row.

      For a CSV with a header row plus n data rows, use hasDataRowCount(n). Use hasRowCount(int) to assert the total row count including the header.

    • hasColumnCount

      public CsvCheck hasColumnCount(int expected)

    • headerEquals
